Query: Query
Response: Response

Query: hello
Response: Hello! How can I assist you today?

Query: hi
Response: Hi there! What can I help you with?

Query: My bill is incorrect
Response: We apologize for the billing error. Please contact our billing team with your account number and we will resolve it within 24 hours.

Query: I was charged twice for the same order
Response: We are sorry for the double charge. We will initiate a refund immediately. Please allow 3-5 business days for the amount to reflect.

Query: How do I update my payment method
Response: You can update your payment method by going to Account Settings then Payment then Update Card Details.

Query: I need an invoice for my last purchase
Response: You can download your invoice from the Orders section in your account dashboard. We can also email it to you.

Query: Why is my subscription cost higher this month
Response: Your subscription cost may have changed due to a plan upgrade or applicable taxes. Please check your billing history for details.

Query: What payment methods do you accept
Response: We accept all major credit and debit cards including PayPal and UPI. You can also pay using gift cards or store credit.

Query: My internet is not working
Response: We are sorry for the inconvenience. Please try restarting your router. If the issue persists our technical team will assist you remotely.

Query: The app keeps crashing on my phone
Response: Please try clearing the app cache and updating to the latest version. If the issue continues we will escalate it to our development team.

Query: I cannot log into my account
Response: Please try resetting your password using the Forgot Password option. If you are still unable to login contact support with your registered email.

Query: My device is not connecting to the service
Response: Please ensure your device firmware is updated. Try disconnecting and reconnecting. Our technicians are available 24/7 for remote assistance.

Query: The website is showing an error
Response: We apologize for the inconvenience. Our team is aware of the issue and is working to fix it. Please try again in a few minutes.

Query: Where is my order
Response: Your order is currently being processed and will be shipped within 2 business days. You will receive a tracking link via email.

Query: My package has not arrived yet
Response: We apologize for the delay. Your package may be held at customs or delayed due to weather. Please track your order using the link sent to your email.

Query: How do I track my shipment
Response: You can track your shipment by entering your order number in the Track Order section or using the link in your shipping confirmation email.

Query: Can I change my delivery address
Response: If your order has not been dispatched yet we can update the delivery address. Please contact us immediately with your order number and new address.

Query: My order was delivered to the wrong address
Response: We are sorry for the inconvenience. Please contact us with your order number and we will arrange a re-delivery or provide a full refund.

Query: How do I return a product
Response: You can initiate a return by visiting the Returns section in your account. Items must be returned within 30 days in original condition with all packaging.

Query: I want to exchange my product
Response: We offer free exchanges within 30 days of purchase. Please initiate the exchange from your account portal and ship the item back to us.

Query: My refund has not been processed
Response: We apologize for the delay. Refunds typically take 5-7 business days. We will escalate your case and ensure it is processed immediately.

Query: Can I return a used product
Response: We accept returns for defective or damaged products even if they have been used. For other cases items must be in original unused condition.

Query: The returned item was damaged during transit
Response: We are sorry to hear that. Please share photos of the damaged package and item. We will arrange a replacement or full refund at no cost to you.

Query: How do I cancel my subscription
Response: You can cancel your subscription from Account Settings then Subscription then Cancel Plan. Your service will continue until the end of the billing cycle.

Query: What are your customer support hours
Response: Our customer support team is available 24 hours a day 7 days a week via chat email and phone.

Query: How do I contact a human agent
Response: You can reach a human agent by clicking Contact Us and selecting Live Chat or Call Us. Average wait time is under 2 minutes.

Query: Do you offer a free trial
Response: Yes we offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card is required to sign up.

Query: How do I reset my password
Response: Click on Forgot Password on the login page and enter your registered email. You will receive a reset link within a few minutes.

Query: I want to upgrade my plan
Response: You can upgrade your plan from Account Settings then Subscription then Change Plan. Upgraded features are available immediately after confirmation.

Query: Is my data secure with your service
Response: Yes we use industry-standard encryption and follow strict data privacy policies. Your data is never shared with third parties without your consent.

Query: How do I delete my account
Response: To delete your account go to Account Settings then Privacy then Delete Account. Please note this action is permanent and all your data will be removed.

Query: Can I have multiple users on one account
Response: Yes our Team and Business plans support multiple users. You can add team members from Account Settings then Team Management.
